summary: Comprehensive testing of HappyCo Concierge V1 dashboard and properties read models completed. Backend APIs are fully functional with all seeded data requirements met. Frontend has persistent session management issue preventing navigation between admin pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence issue - admin login successful but navigation to Properties/Diagnostics pages redirects back to login page

integration_issues.flow: Admin navigation between dashboard, properties, diagnostics pages
integration_issues.issue: Session cookie/authentication state not maintained during inter-page navigation in admin shell

passed_tests: Public landing page loads with backend-driven numbers ($17,924 gross revenue, $1,040 credits)
Public legal page exists at /legal with complete legal/privacy/cookie information
Admin login works with admin@happyco.com / admin123
Manager login correctly rejected (sarah.mitchell@riverside.com redirects back to login)
Resident demo accounts visible on login page (alex.chen@email.com, sarah.mitchell@riverside.com, admin@happyco.com)
Dashboard loads with seeded data showing Alex Chen, Maria Santos, James Wilson as flagged residents
Dashboard reconciliation shows correct totals: $17,924 gross revenue, $1,040 credits, 25 at-risk residents
Backend dashboard API returns complete data including flagship property metrics
Backend properties API shows 3 required properties with Sarah Mitchell as manager for The Metropolitan at Riverside
Backend public overview API provides all landing page data
Diagnostics page accessible when accessing directly via URL (session doesn't break on direct access)
All /app/admin/* routes properly gated (manager accounts rejected)
Cookie notice bar visible and working
Footer legal links functional (navigates to /legal successfully)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (29/29 tests passed including new dashboard/properties endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 75% (login, data display, direct URL access working; navigation persistence failing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session persistence issue in admin shell. Admin authentication works correctly but session state is not maintained when navigating between admin pages (dashboard -> properties, dashboard -> diagnostics). Check React auth context, session cookie configuration, and route protection logic. The issue appears to be in the AdminShell component or authentication state management.
